CodeBlockMethod.Name: DropItem
CodeBlockMethod.Code:
local modelID = "model://fa15de67-b9e6-4a94-8e9e-aca831248aa3" local modelName = "Coin" local potionX = self.Entity.TransformComponent.Position.x local potionY = self.Entity.TransformComponent.Position.y local parent = _EntityService:GetEntityByPath("/maps/map01")
math.randomseed(os.time()) if math.random(1, 100) > 70 then log("코인이 생겼어요~") _SpawnService:SpawnByModelId(modelID, modelName, Vector3(potionX, potionY, 0), parent) end
